title: euonymus alatus var. microphyllus
intro: Euonymus alatus var. microphyllus, also known as the Dwarf or Compact Paperbark Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Euonymus alatus var. microphyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the bark or leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams.
